no-compliant-rung.renders_at: legend-only today (no matrix cell currently renders this class): the cold cells graduated independently — gVisor unique-image-cold to controller_cold_floor_zero_corroborated (honest-zero, hb#230/#214, needs NO webhook), Kata unique-image-cold NOW to true_ttfe @ 0.822/cluster (5s), node_count=5; 1s honestly pending (cold ttfe_p95=2475ms > 1000ms). #761's true-TTFE basis was ADOPTED on the Kata cold 5s cell 2026-07-23 via a webhook-corroborated cold step-up sweep — the webhook-inject-timestamp example was DEPLOYED on the Kata measurement cluster and 3 cold claims were stamped, so the cell now publishes true_ttfe on main (superseding the prior unresolved_bounds_bar_bracketed). Adoption gap CLOSED 2026-07-23: the automated Kata refresh path is now LIVE-FIRED end-to-end (config cloudbuild-refresh-gke-kata.yaml + provisioning block [4/4] in scripts/setup-cloud-build-triggers.sh, landed via hb#366) — the fire ran through a self-arming fire wrapper that re-grants the refresh SA's stripped container.admin as a fail-closed pre-fire transaction (closing the prior 403), build 395d0bf4 SUCCESS, cold-honesty guard verified 0 resident kata nodes. It produced the first guard-verified-cold kata warm-pool-hit true_ttfe (p95 3078.7ms, node_count=1), published to the live matrix via PR #372 (merged 2026-07-23); the refresh-delta tripwire flagged a 3.2x swing / verdict flip ✅→❌ vs the 2026-07-05 warm-pool number (0.9628s, node_count=2), which was ADOPTED as the honest North Star warm-pool baseline (2026-07-23) — the prior 0.9628s was a warm-cache understatement measured on a pre-warmed cluster, NOT a guard-verified cold floor; a confirming node_count=2 re-fire is a non-blocking follow-up. The gVisor cold cell still publishes the floor-zero basis until its next refresh adopts true_ttfe (prom_ttfe is offline PHASE-A only, not imported in run.py; the cold SLO-rate cells come from the out-of-process CL2 step-up sweep).

refs.note: still OPEN/unmerged (public API 2026-07-24: state=open, merged=false; no OWNER approval). MERGED 2026-07-22T18:19:52Z (merge_sha dd63bb1b2), on main tip aee6d3b (git merge-base --is-ancestor verified). SEPARATE PR from #1087, DISTINCT implementation: CreationLatencyRecordedAnnotation (internal/metrics/metrics.go:39) persisted via Patch + cache-backed r.Get (sandboxclaim_controller.go:163, guard :1891). SCOPE: definitively closes the suspend/resume re-record leg; whether it closes the LOAD-BEARING stale-informer-replay leg is UNVERIFIED against merged-main — the guard reads a cache-backed claim, so a replay serving a pre-annotation snapshot could still slip past both it and the oldReady early-return.
